title: JZK 24 Blue baby shower favour box boy sweet box for baby boy birthday party christening baptism newborn party
features: Cute blue favour box for boy birthday favours & boy baby shower favours, can hold sweets, confetti, candy, chocolate, and other gadget.
Beautiful sweets box is made of durable card paper with slightly pearly luster, can use as birthday place holder / party table decoration, also can be part of guest keepsake.
The finished product size: 6.5 x 3 x 10.5 cm. Package contains: 24 blue favours box. You need to assemble them, they're super easy to assemble.
Ideal party favour box for: boy baby shower / boy birthday / boy baptism / boy christening / boy holy communion / boy graduation / Christmas / Easter, etc.
